hbe6cb8dag9bf7g4c5agbf19g919d7277e1cc: If Silvanus is the mighty oak, his druids were but the weakest of his leaves, tossed by the winds of fury.
h33a497abg1cafg4dc7g80b9g327074f694b8: I can't shake the image of what happened to the grove: the winds have blown and the harvest has come. The oak stands lone and barren.
h1263f4e7g0a6eg4289ga3cage9f816893dab: A grove destroyed... I don't think I can forgive myself.
h02e373b0ga57eg4f8bga722g43bcbe786473: After winter, spring will come, but I'm not sure we left behind much fertile ground.
h6d6a4d1fg0ac7g4974ga015g1e5d62bd7186: The druids caused the harvest. It was only just we did the reaping.
hb4067188ga086g45e4g9014g6eb28c59a4c6: Yes, well, I prefer to pluck apples and pick strawberries. They don't tend to weigh on one's conscience.
h97a5e536gefecg4c7cg85a0g7200c1b3b57f: They felt threatened and lashed out. A tragedy I wish we could have avoided.
h2de4812bg4ebfg4e26gb807g85a6ec5b4b9d: Their actions are on them, that much is true, but the consequences are ours to carry.
hbe037421gfb2ag4de3g95ddg73d4bdb56ebe: They were in need of a lesson - and we taught it well.
h7a17caacgb7cag4fe3g9f16g7f70715a03be: One usually needs to be alive to reap the benefits of education. If anything we taught them too well.
h5fa5adc1g799ag45d0g9179g229fe97c2f8a: Come, let's move on. What's done is done.
hc69bf198g6ddcg4d3agb9f7g24f528d79ca2: Look around you. What's done is done, but what's wrong is also wrong.
